rootCause: The Windows cmd shim escaped embedded TOML quotes in two string-valued config overrides, so strict-config rejected the malformed field before session creation.
observedFailure: Codex exited with code 1 while loading config and emitted no Agent JSON event.
correctiveBoundary: Pass the same elevated and xhigh values as unquoted raw TOML fallback strings, add exact regression assertions, validate strict-config through the exact Windows shim against an intentionally missing workspace, publish a new runner commit, and freeze a superseding execution binding before retrying.
